query: Hi, I am a basic member and i am looking to get a refund however i have already used the service , is that possible ?
final_response: You've mentioned you're a basic member and have already used the service. Our policy for basic plans states that a refund is generally available within 14 days of purchase. However, it also specifies that a refund is not applicable if the service has been fully used. As an AI, I cannot process refunds directly or make a definitive decision on your specific situation. To have your request reviewed in detail and to check for any potential eligibility, I will need to escalate this to a human support agent who can assess your account further. Regarding your request for a refund after having used the service, our refund policy typically depends on specific circumstances and terms of service. Please reach out to our support team directly with your account details so we can review your eligibility.
